Name: Intuitive Machines Inc.
Description: Intuitive Machines Inc. (LUNR) is a leading aerospace company dedicated to advancing lunar and space exploration, prominently contributing to NASA's Artemis program. The firm provides a comprehensive portfolio of mission services, encompassing spacecraft design, transportation, payload delivery, and data management. With its cutting-edge engineering expertise, Intuitive Machines is strategically aligned to capitalize on the growing demand for lunar resources and commercial exploration initiatives, solidifying its position as a frontrunner in the emerging space economy.
Address: 13467 COLUMBIA SHUTTLE STREET, HOUSTON, TX, UNITED STATES, 77059
